name: Fnllyn Bara Lawr Ae Oen Cymreig Alewn Crwstyn - Welsh
recipeInstructions:
1. Skin and bone the loin of lamb.
2. Finely chop the onions and sweat in 3 oz drippings until translucent, about 5 minutes.
3. Add finely chopped mushrooms to the onions and cook for another 2 minutes.
4. Stir in breadcrumbs, laverbread, chopped parsley, a little milk, and seasoning until well combined.
5. Stuff the loin with the mixture, tie securely, and seal with melted drippings.
6. Roast the stuffed loin at 430°F (220°C) for 30 minutes.
7. Cool and drain the cooked meat.
8. Roll out the shortcrust pastry into a rectangle approximately 1/4 inch thick.
9. Spread the remaining stuffing mixture over the pastry, leaving a 2-inch border all around.
10. Place the cooled loin in the center of the pastry and brush with beaten egg wash.
11. Envelop the meat completely in the pastry, ensuring there are no gaps.
12. Turn the parcel right side out and place on a greased baking sheet with the folds underneath.
13. Brush the entire surface with egg wash and decorate as desired.
14. Bake at 425°F (220°C) for an additional 30 minutes until golden brown.
15. Garnish with chopped parsley and sliced tomatoes.
16. Serve with sautéed leeks, baked potatoes, and a traditional British brown sauce.
